Points: 20
Estimated time: 1 day

### What needs doing
- Add unit tests for the main functions in `packages/core/src/utils/index.ts`.
- Cover parsing, formatting, and invalid/edge-case inputs.

### Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Tests added and passing locally.
- [ ] Edge cases covered.

### Branch / Commit
- Suggested branch: `test/utils-unit-tests`
- Commit example: `test(utils): add unit tests for parse/format`

> Before pushing, run `git pull --rebase origin main` and resolve conflicts locally.
